caption: A man with dark skin and glasses wears a tall, grey, pointed wig, a white button-down shirt, a red bow tie, and tan suspenders. He wears black over-the-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone on a boom arm. The setting is a room with white walls decorated with framed photos and clothing racks. Two logos appear on screen: one featuring a microphone icon and the text "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" and another that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the sequence, the man remains in a medium shot, gesturing with his hands as he speaks. His mouth opens and closes, and his right hand moves from a resting position to pointing slightly toward his side. The background remains static, consisting of a grid of framed photographs and a white storage unit.
